title: Glasgow Airport and New York united once again with return of direct flights

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Glasgow Airport and New York united once again with return of direct flights. United Airlines has confirmed it is to return to Glasgow Airport in 2026 to reinstate direct flights to its New York hub, Newark Liberty...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Glasgow Airport and New York united once again with return of direct flights
